title: alchemilla hybrida var. intermedia
intro: Alchemilla hybrida var. intermedia, also known as the intermediate lady's mantle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to heal wounds and skin irritations. Alchemilla hybrida var. intermedia is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used to make salves and creams for topical application.
